When to use:

Review REST and HTTP API design for resource modeling, contracts, validation, errors, pagination, versioning, and backward compatibility. Use when designing new endpoints, reviewing OpenAPI specs, evaluating breaking changes, or standardizing error and pagination patterns.

Linked resources:

- `.github/skills/api-design-review/references/rest-contract-patterns.md`
